doc: Pure-TS port of GMP mpn_copyi: copy n limbs from s in increasing-address order. Substrate-class -- operates on raw bigint arrays, not src/core.ts MPFR values; runner sets requireCoreImport=false for substrate. In C, mpn_copyi and mpn_copyd differ only when src and dst overlap; in the immutable TS substrate both return a fresh array and are functionally equivalent. Kept as separate exports so the GMP I/O contract matches name-for-name with C callers in the call graph.
c_signature: void mpn_copyi(mp_limb_t *rp, const mp_limb_t *sp, mp_size_t n)
refs: mpfr/src/mpfr-mini-gmp.c L198, L204, L234, L263 -- mpn_copyi call sites inside mpn_divrem_1 / mpn_tdiv_qr.
